canonical_definition: A large-scale dataset of Grounded Image-Text pairs, constructed from web data, that links text spans in captions to their corresponding image regions via bounding boxes.
papers: Ferret: Refer and Ground Anything Anywhere at Any Granularity
Grounding Multimodal Large Language Models to the World
